originalTitle: 3 Big Reasons to Love Motorola Solutions (MSI)
summary: Motorola Solutions trades at $399.39 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 8.8% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 13.2%.
content:
Motorola Solutions trades at $399.39 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 8.8% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 13.2%.

Is now a good time to buy MSI? Find out in our full research report, it’s free .

Born from the company that invented the first portable handheld police radio in 1940, Motorola Solutions (NYSE:MSI) provides mission-critical communications, video security, and command center software solutions for public safety agencies and enterprise customers.

What makes Motorola Solutions' cash flow performance strong?

What drives Motorola Solutions' impressive revenue growth?

How has Motorola Solutions' profitability improved recently?

Is Motorola Solutions fairly valued at current prices?

1. Skyrocketing Revenue Shows Strong Momentum

A company’s long-term sales performance can indicate its overall quality. Any business can have short-term success, but a top-tier one grows for years. Thankfully, Motorola Solutions’s 9.5% annualized revenue growth over the last five years was impressive. Its growth surpassed the average business services company and shows its offerings resonate with customers.

2. Adjusted Operating Margin Rising, Profits Up

Adjusted operating margin is an important measure of profitability as it shows the portion of revenue left after accounting for all core expenses – everything from the cost of goods sold to advertising and wages. It’s also useful for comparing profitability across companies because it excludes non-recurring expenses, interest on debt, and taxes.

Looking at the trend in its profitability, Motorola Solutions’s adjusted operating margin rose by 5.3 percentage points over the last five years, as its sales growth gave it immense operating leverage. Its adjusted operating margin for the trailing 12 months was 30.4%.

3. Excellent Free Cash Flow Margin Boosts Reinvestment Potential

Free cash flow isn't a prominently featured metric in company financials and earnings releases, but we think it's telling because it accounts for all operating and capital expenses, making it tough to manipulate. Cash is king.

Motorola Solutions has shown terrific cash profitability, enabling it to reinvest, return capital to investors, and stay ahead of the competition while maintaining an ample cushion. The company’s free cash flow margin was among the best in the business services sector, averaging 19.2% over the last five years.

These are just a few reasons why we're bullish on Motorola Solutions, but at $399.39 per share (or 23.8× forward P/E), is now the time to initiate a position? See for yourself in our full research report, it’s free .

chineseTitle: 喜爱 Motorola Solutions (MSI) 的 3 大理由
chineseSummary: Motorola Solutions 的交易价格为 399.39 美元，与市场同步发展。过去六个月，其股价上涨了 8.8%，而标准普尔 500 指数则上涨了 13.2%。
chineseContent:
Motorola Solutions 的交易价格为 399.39 美元，与市场同步发展。过去六个月，其股价上涨了 8.8%，而标准普尔 500 指数则上涨了 13.2%。

现在是购买 MSI 的好时机吗？请在我们的完整研究报告中找到答案，它是免费的。

Motorola Solutions（纽约证券交易所代码：MSI）诞生于 1940 年发明第一台便携式手持警用无线电的公司，为公共安全机构和企业客户提供关键任务通信、视频安全和指挥中心软件解决方案。

是什么让摩托罗拉系统的现金流表现强劲？

是什么推动摩托罗拉系统实现令人瞩目的收入增长？

摩托罗拉系统公司的盈利能力最近有何改善？

摩托罗拉系统公司当前的价格是否合理？

1、收入飙升，势头强劲

一个公司的长期销售业绩可以体现其整体质量。任何企业都可能取得短期成功，但顶级企业却可以长期成长。值得庆幸的是，摩托罗拉解决方案过去五年的年收入增长率高达 9.5%，令人印象深刻。它的增长超过了商业服务公司的平均水平，表明其产品与客户产生了共鸣。

2.调整后营业利润率上升，利润上升

调整后的营业利润率是衡量盈利能力的一个重要指标，因为它显示了扣除所有核心费用（从销售商品成本到广告和工资）后剩余的收入部分。它对于比较不同公司的盈利能力也很有用，因为它不包括非经常性费用、债务利息和税收。

从盈利趋势来看，摩托罗拉系统的调整后营业利润率在过去五年中增长了 5.3 个百分点，因为其销售增长为其带来了巨大的营业杠杆。其过去 12 个月的调整后营业利润率为 30.4%。

3. 优秀的自由现金流保证金提升再投资潜力

自由现金流并不是公司财务和收益发布中的一个突出指标，但我们认为它很能说明问题，因为它考虑了所有运营和资本支出，因此很难操纵。现金为王。

摩托罗拉解决方案显示出极高的现金盈利能力，使其能够进行再投资、向投资者返还资本、在竞争中保持领先地位，同时保持充足的缓冲。该公司的自由现金流利润率在商业服务行业名列前茅，过去五年平均为 19.2%。

这些只是我们看好摩托罗拉解决方案的几个原因，但以每股 399.39 美元（或 23.8 倍远期市盈率）的价格，现在是建仓的时候吗？请亲自查看我们的完整研究报告，它是免费的。

适合所有市场条件的优质股票

当你在这里时：排名前九的跑赢市场的股票。最好的股票不会只跑赢市场一次。他们又这么做了。又来了。强劲的收入增长、不断增长的自由现金流、资本回报率让他们在竞争中遥遥领先。市场已经给这些企业带来了回报。

但我们的人工智能平台表示派对还没有结束。免费了解本周有哪些 9 只股票被下调。在这里免费获取我们排名前 9 的跑赢市场的股票。

进入我们名单的股票包括现在熟悉的名字，如 Nvidia（2020 年 6 月至 2025 年 6 月期间增长 1,326%），以及曾经不为人知的企业，如曾经的小盘股公司 Comfort Systems（五年回报率增长 782%）。立即通过 StockStory 寻找您的下一个大赢家。
